field_mapping.category: Top-level category (core TAPDB bundles use generic)
field_mapping.type: Type within category (core TAPDB bundles use generic and actor)
field_mapping.instance_prefix: EUID prefix for instances (core TAPDB bundles use GX placeholder, rewritten to [client]GX at seed time)
field_mapping.json_addl: Flexible JSON data for template-specific properties
